title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Garp, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Vivi as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.text: were...

dialogue.text: KUEH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Waah!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: You just talking about Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Ah! The mermaid Princess! (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just because they were talking about him doesn't mean they know him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy is a pirate! We can't afford people to know that he's our friend- Sido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: urgh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They went to the new world, and pirate ships have to go by the fishman island route, so...

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Hey! Did you just say "luffy"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Wait! What if you just misheard her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did!:) Are you all acquainted with him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop that! Everyone knows his name!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are indebted to Luffy and his friends, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Same!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Miss Vivi is becoming friends with the mermaid Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Rebecca looks like she's having fun.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My sister isn't very accustomed to mingling with others. I'm glad they're talking with her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a strange connection.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Isn't that Rebecca from dress- Rosa?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oi! Over there,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm SA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Chinjao's grandson!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH! BROTHER! SO YOU CAME TOO, EH, Leo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: As a secret bodyguard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you here if you're a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heh, Lemme tell you a thing or two!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with this job, I'm going to cut ties with the country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! This is just rich! PRIN- Cess VIVI!

dialogue.text: Wapol?! why are you here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Mahaha Hahaha haha! You idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: inter- eating, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi K

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I flew, you see! Straw hat luffy sent me to some far corner of the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, is he one of Luffy's friends, too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No. He's an enemy, shira- Hoshi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Tidbits about WAPOL

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the former King of Drum Kingdom, he was an unfit ruler that oppressed and misgoverned his subjects.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He flashed with the straw hats and was sent flying, far across the sky.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, with the power of his baku baku baku baku baku baku baku baku no mi, he amassed great wealth, and eventually built himself and his money a new kingdom, atop which he has crawled and now sits as king.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: How's that stupidly serious King cobra?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's good, right? In fact, I just saw him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I know he is! I'm just being sarcastic! Mahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uggghhh!:) Your humor is universe!) Tamanokoshi Koshikoshi:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi Koshi!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: enough of your boring jibes.

dialogue.text: I see you've birthday yet another dis- mal country.

dialogue.text: Hihi Hihi!

dialogue.text: KING OF THE SAKURA KINGDOM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, the world government really is slipping! I can't believe they let an idiot like you BACK into the alliance!

dialogue.text: Doctor of the Sakura kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dalton! The Witch Granny! So you're still alive?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? The secret to my youthful appear- once?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
